name: subagent
description: Run an isolated subagent to produce a focused report.

max_steps.description: Maximum tool loop steps for the subagent.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for the subagent execution.

persona.description: The name of a persona to use (e.g., 'architect', 'reviewer'). instructions will be loaded from state/personas/{persona}.json

async_mode.description: If true, run the subagent in background and return immediately with a job_id for polling via action='status'.

action.description: The action to perform. 'run' starts a subagent, 'status' checks progress.

job_id.description: The job_id to check (used with action='status').
